min_version.description: Oldest marketing version allowed to continue when platform-specific build gates are unset.

min_build_android.description: Oldest Android versionCode allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible Android build is available.

min_build_ios.description: Oldest iOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible iOS build is available.

min_build_web.description: Oldest web build allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible web build is deployed.

min_build_macos.description: Oldest macOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible macOS build is available.

store_url_android.description: Play Store URL used by the force-update screen once the listing is public.

store_url_ios.description: App Store URL used by the force-update screen once the listing is public.
